name: Barbarian

subclasses: Path of the Berserker (PHB), Path of the Totem Warrior (PHB)
key_class_features: 1: Rage, Unarmored Defense; 2: Reckless Attack, Danger Sense; 3: Primal Path; 5: Extra Attack, Fast Movement; 7: Feral Instinct; 9: Brutal Critical; 11: Relentless Rage; 15: Persistent Rage; 18: Indomitable Might; 20: Primal Champion

subclasses: College of Lore (PHB), College of Valor (PHB)
